Electronics Case

Low-Volume Copper Alloy Connector Machining for Electronics

copper alloy connector / electrical contact / batch consistency

IndustriesElectronics
Part Functioncopper alloy connector / electrical contact / batch consistency
Manufacturing Capabilitiescopper alloy machining, burr control, plating coordination and dimensional inspection

Project Scenario

The connector project required low-volume copper alloy parts with controlled edges and stable fit for electrical contact use.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The delivered batch gave the customer parts for assembly testing and plating-related verification.
